title: No AFK Time Played
description: Keeps track of any players' time on a server, but just minus the afk time!
body:
This datapack makes it to where the played minutes of each individual player is listed in the tab menu, but it removes the artificial inflation of minutes by AFKing!

It does this by keeping track of time played, minus the time when the player is standing still, which usually means AFK.

May not be 100% accurate!
